calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-05-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday March 5, 2015 in Department 525:
Lyudmila Aronova, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as propria Persona.
John Fisher, Esq. counsel for Appellant/Defendant CD Design and Kung-Yuen Chiu/owner who is also present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn. Ms. Aronova responds to questions from Judge Myles and also tesifies on her behalf.
The following documentary evidence is introduced:
exhibit (A) letter from CD Design/Mr. Chiu, 1 page project tracking sysytem, e-mail of 3R report, list of incoming & outgoing calls.

Counsel Fisher testifies on behalf of CD Design. Mr. Chiu testifies and responds to questions from Judge Myles. The following documentary evidence are introduced:
exhibit (1)- Letter dated 3/4/2015 to Ms. Aronova (e-mails- exhibit from previous hearing).
exhibit (2)- 3 documents - Agreement, subdivision application checklist, Preliminary report approval.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly evidence retained by the Court.

Judge Elliott Myles; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-05-2015 Continued To Mar-05-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday Feb. 5, 2015 in Department 525:
No Appearance by Lyudmila Aronova, Respondent/Plaintiff
Associate Counsel John Fisher of Herbert W. Yanowitz, appearing for Defendant/Appellant CD Design and Kung-Yuen Chiu of CD Design who is also present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Mr. Chiu is Sworn.
Counsel of Appellant/Defendant requests continuance for additional month. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (A) 8/5/14 letter of correspondence.

The Court continued the matter to Mar. 5, 2015, at 9am in Dept. 525; (per CRC 8.960, No further continuances will be granted) unless notice of settlement filed before Mar. 5, 2015.

Newly evidence retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tempore: Elliott Myles; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-08-2015 Continued To Feb-05-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday Jan. 8, 2015 in Department 525:
No Appearance by Respondent/Plaintiff Lyudmila Aronova.
Herbert W. Yanowitz, Esq.,for Appellant/Defendant CD Design who is also present by owner Kung-Yuen Chiu.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Mr. chiu is sworn.
Counsel requests continuance for more time; parties are into settlement but need time to April. Letter of continuance agreement from Lyudmila Aronova shown to the Court.

The Court continue the hearing to Feb. 5, 2015; Clerk to send an Order of continuance to the parties.

Judge Pro Tempore: David H.S. Commins; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-04-2014 Continued To Jan-08-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
No Appearance by Plaintiff/Respondent.
Associate Counsel John Fisher of Herbert W. Yanowitz, appearing for Defendant/Appellant CD Design.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Counsel stipulated to use Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles and Order signed on 8/7/2014.

Counsel requesting continuance; parties needs more time on the settlement.
Because of stipulation requesting continuance of hearing filed on Nov. 20,2014 by the parties that the Court continued the case to Jan. 8, 2015, 9 am, dept. 525. and No Further Continuances will be granted unless good cause shown; appellant to give notice.

Judge Pro temp Elliott Myles, Clerk Jean Kong, Not Reported (D525)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-18-2014 Continued To Dec-04-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: 9:15am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk J. Kong, D525, not reported.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal.
Appellant:CD Design appears by counsel Herbert W. Yanowitz, esq. Bar #37300
Respondent:No appearance

Counsel requests the court to continue the matters; parties are in the discussion on settlement. The hearing will be continue to 12/04/2014 and counsel is to prepare a Proposed Order for the Court to sign by Aug. 20th.

9:20am
Matter is undersubmission

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-09-2014 Judgment Entered
